user_query: How long did James and Samantha date for before deciding to move in together?
full_query: READ(/Root/Conversation_Version[1]/Speaker[atom(content =~ "James")]/Session[atom(content =~ "dating relationship move in together")]/Observation[atom(content =~ "dated for") or atom(content =~ "move in together")])
xpath_query: /Root/Conversation_Version[1]/Speaker[atom(content =~ "James")]/Session[atom(content =~ "dating relationship move in together")]/Observation[atom(content =~ "dated for") or atom(content =~ "move in together")]
canonical_full_query: READ(/Root/Conversation_Version[1]/Speaker[content =~ "James"]/Session[content =~ "dating relationship move in together"]/max(Observation[content =~ "dated for"], Observation[content =~ "move in together"]))
canonical_xpath_query: /Root/Conversation_Version[1]/Speaker[content =~ "James"]/Session[content =~ "dating relationship move in together"]/max(Observation[content =~ "dated for"], Observation[content =~ "move in together"])
